<?php namespace MailerSend\Tests\Helpers\Builder; use MailerSend\Helpers\Arr; use MailerSend\Exceptions\MailerSendAssertException; use MailerSend\Helpers\Builder\Recipient; use MailerSend\Tests\TestCase; class RecipientTest extends TestCase { public function test_properly_sets_recipient_params(): void { $recipient = (new Recipient('email@mailersend.com', 'Recipient'))->toArray(); self::assertEquals('email@mailersend.com', Arr::get($recipient, 'email')); self::assertEquals('Recipient', Arr::get($recipient, 'name')); } public function test_recipient_validates_email(): void { $this->expectException(MailerSendAssertException::class); (new Recipient('emailmailersend.com', 'Recipient')); } }
